entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange represented by the coindeal.com trading domain and historical spot-market listings.
entity.notes: Current exchange-directory data preserves the CoinDeal identity and first-party domain but reports untracked volume and no reserve or market data. The first-party trading interface could not be independently verified during this review, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead. Launch date and a precise jurisdiction remain unset rather than inferred from weak secondary claims.

evidence.title: CoinDeal official exchange domain
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is preserved by the current exchange profile, but the trading interface was not independently verified in this review.

evidence.title: CoinDeal exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current profile preserves the centralized exchange identity and official domain while reporting untracked volume, unavailable reserve data, and no current market data.
